episodes.title: DOJ publishes more Epstein documents mentioning Trump after initial omission
episodes.description:
The Department of Justice released additional Epstein files on Thursday, including uncorroborated accusations from a woman claiming she was sexually assaulted by President Donald Trump.

episodes.title: Inside Scoop: Jeffrey Epstein is stranger than fiction
episodes.description:
Jim Antle brings to life the pages of the Washington Examiner magazine in the show Inside Scoop with exclusive insight from the article authors and expert analysis.

Our in-depth report this week, by Daniel Ross Goodman, covers the scandal of the Epstein Royal Reckoning.

episodes.title: Top moments in Hillary Clinton's Epstein deposition
episodes.description:
The House Committee on Oversight and Reform released videos of former President Bill Clinton and former Secretary of State Hillary Clinton‘s testimonies on Monday following last week’s hours-long depositions related to lawmakers’ extensive Jeffrey Epstein investigation.

The videos of Hillary and Bill, which totaled more than nine hours in combined total length, were taken last Thursday and last Friday, respectively. Committee Chairman James Comer (R-KY) said they amounted to “an historical” interview of the Clintons following widespread interest in their testimony over their references in the Epstein files release.

0:00 Opening statement "cover up"
3:30 Is this bi-partisan?
4:00 You were clothed with immense power
6:23 Photos leaked
10:03 Trump "has a tell"
11:30 Should Trump be deposed? "Absolutely."
13:44 Does "pattern of behavior" apply to Bill Clinton, too?
16:33 Clinton reads "bizarre" letters
18:25 How do you feel about Bill being named in Epstein files? 
18:48 Epstein spy allegations

Read more here:
https://www.washingtonexaminer.com/news/4477241/bill-clinton-hillary-clinton-epstein-deposition-videos-released/

#washingtonexaminer #hillaryclinton #billclinton #epsteinfiles 

Check out our website: 
https://www.washingtonexaminer.com/

episodes.title: Bill Clinton denies knowledge of Epstein’s crimes: ‘I saw nothing’
episodes.description:
Former President Bill Clinton said he had no knowledge of Jeffrey Epstein’s criminal conduct and “did nothing wrong,” according to opening remarks released publicly on Friday as he appeared for a closed-door deposition before the House oversight committee.

“I had no idea of the crimes Epstein was committing,” Clinton said in the prepared statement posted to X ahead of the interview. “I saw nothing, and I did nothing wrong.”

Read more here:
https://www.washingtonexaminer.com/news/house/4474494/bill-clinton-denies-knowledge-epstein-crimes-saw-nothing/

#washingtonexaminer #billclinton #congress #epsteinfiles #hillaryclinton #jamescomer

episodes.title: Vatican rejects Trump peace board and Mace presses CIA on Epstein
episodes.description:
The Vatican will not be joining President Donald Trump’s Board of Peace tasked with overseeing the reconstruction process in post-war Gaza, an official in the central governing body of the Roman Catholic Church said on Tuesday.

Rep. Nancy Mace (R-SC) on Tuesday called for the CIA to release any records it holds related to Jeffrey Epstein. 

The Supreme Court announced Tuesday it updated its rules of the court in an effort to help justices avoid conflicts of interest with parties before them.#washingtonexaminer

Read more here:
https://www.washingtonexaminer.com/news/world/4460883/vatican-rejects-invitation-trump-board-of-peace-united-nations-crisis-manager/

episodes.title: Kaelan Deese on Pam Bondi's combative hearing on the Epstein Files
episodes.description:
Washington Examiner Justice Department Reporter Kaelan Deese joins Magazine Executive Editor Jim Antle to discuss Attorney General Pam Bondi's fiery hearing, about the Epstein Files, against Congressional Democrats. Uncertainty from both sides of Bondi being unfit for her role as Attorney General. No members of the grand jury move forward on the "Seditious Six" lawmakers.

#washingtonexaminer #pambondi #epsteinfiles #congress #hearing

Read more here:
https://www.washingtonexaminer.com/news/justice/4454940/seven-takeaways-from-bondis-fiery-house-testimony/

Check out our website: 
https://www.washingtonexaminer.com/

episodes.title: Bondi faces questions on Epstein files release in DOJ oversight hearing
episodes.description:
Following interruptions by Rep. Jerry Nadler (D-NY), Bondi unloaded on Democrats over their history of targeting President Donald Trump in two separate impeachments during his first term in office, followed by two federal indictments after he left office.

Bondi attempted to answer Nadler’s multilayered question, which included Democratic scrutiny of indictments and criminal investigations against Trump’s political enemies, such as former FBI Director James Comey and the recent investigation into Federal Reserve Chairman Jerome Powell. Nadler then interjected and pressed her over the Justice Department’s handling of the Epstein files. #washingtonexaminer

Read more here:
https://www.washingtonexaminer.com/live-blog/bondi-house-hearing-epstein-files-justice-department-live-updates/

Check out our website: 
https://www.washingtonexaminer.com/

episodes.title: Ghislaine Maxwell dangles Trump, Clinton innocence claim in trade for clemency
episodes.description:
Ghislaine Maxwell, the onetime girlfriend and accomplice of Jeffrey Epstein, is demanding clemency from President Donald Trump in exchange for coming clean about her ties to the convicted sex offender.

Maxwell, who is currently serving a 20-year prison sentence, sat for a closed-door interview with the House Oversight and Government Reform Committee on Monday as part of its investigation into Epstein. The interview ended an hour after it began as Maxwell refused to answer questions, invoking her Fifth Amendment right against self-incrimination. #washingtonexaminer

Read more here:
https://www.washingtonexaminer.com/news/house/4450852/ghislaine-maxwell-pleads-fifth-demands-clemency-jeffrey-epstein-investigation/

Check out our website: 
https://www.washingtonexaminer.com/

episodes.title: Hillary Clinton no shows Epstein deposition after letter excoriating Comer
episodes.description:
Former Secretary of State Hillary Clinton is facing the prospect of being held in contempt of Congress after she failed to appear for her deposition before the House Oversight and Government Reform Committee on Wednesday for its investigation into the files related to the late convicted sex offender Jeffrey Epstein.

Clinton was scheduled to appear before the committee the day after her husband, former President Bill Clinton, also did not show up for his deposition in the investigation.

episodes.title: House Oversight moves to hold Bill Clinton in contempt after Epstein no-show
episodes.description:
Former President Bill Clinton now faces the prospect of being held in contempt of Congress after he failed to appear for his deposition before the House Oversight and Government Reform Committee on Tuesday morning for its investigation into the files related to convicted sex offender Jeffrey Epstein.

The former president was scheduled to appear before the committee on Tuesday, with former Secretary of State Hillary Clinton set for Wednesday. No president has ever been held in contempt of Congress through a completed process. 

#washingtonexaminer #jeffreyepstein #billclinton #hilaryclinton 

Read more here:
https://www.washingtonexaminer.com/news/house/4416649/house-oversight-committee-move-bill-clinton-contempt-of-congress/

https://www.washingtonexaminer.com/

episodes.title: DOJ drops thousands more Epstein files, some including Trump’s name
episodes.description:
The Department of Justice said it released over 30,000 more files related to Jeffrey Epstein on Tuesday, but warned that some included “sensationalist claims” about President Donald Trump and his relation to the disgraced financier.

“Some of these documents contain untrue and sensationalist claims made against President Trump that were submitted to the FBI right before the 2020 election,” the DOJ wrote in the announcement Tuesday morning. “To be clear: the claims are unfounded and false, and if they had a shred of credibility, they certainly would have been weaponized against President Trump already.”

#washingtonexaminer #jeffreyepstein #donaldtrump #doj #epsteinfiles 

Read more here:
https://www.washingtonexaminer.com/news/justice/4356442/doj-thousands-more-epstein-files-including-trump-name-flights-ghislaine-maxwell/
